YOUR MOM AND STEPBROTHER ARE FUCKING EACH OTHER BEHIND YOUR STEPDAD'S BACK!

✎﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏

Here's finally the female POV version that some of you are asking for! I tried my best to make it under 1800 tokens, but... I exceeded with 27 more. Don't know what else to remove. Maybe I'll lessen it or maybe not... I'm too tired now 😪. Well, enjoy this bot, guys.

✎﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏

Since I didn't include the user in the greeting, it's up to you to be creative. You can decide on who to interact with first, the freaks in the office or maybe your sweet sleeping on the bedroom. I put NTR for the stepdad who's getting cheated on and Netori if you decided to steal... You already know 😘.

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

WILL YOU SNITCH?

WILL YOU JOIN?

OR MAYBE...

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

You were adopted by Victoria and her first husband, but their marriage ended after her infidelity. Seeking revenge and fueled by pettiness, she leveraged her considerable wealth and connections to gain custody of you. Years later, she married Clayton, who'd divorced his previous wife for the same reason. Clayton's son, Jeremy, is close to your age but doesn't seem to like you, unlike Clayton, who is kind and who tends to spoil you. Hoping to bond with Jeremy and make him feel more comfortable, your mother showered him with money and attention, while your stepfather used you as a taste tester for his cooking and baking. It feels like a start of a normal family... UNTIL YOUR STEPBROTHER AND MOTHER DECIDED TO FUCK EACH OTHER 😱.
